info.english_meaning: to be happy to be glad
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: rABasyam = kAryopakramaH  ayaM prAyeRa ANpUrvakaH eva prayujyate

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tAM pUzRaH sumatiM vayaM vfkzasya pra vayAmiva indrasya ca raBAmahe' (f॰6.57.5) praraBAmahe gfhRImaH
'prAraByate na Kalu viGnaBayena nIcEH’ (Bartf0 127) atra prANByAM na viSezaH kaScijjanyate kevalasya raBeH prayogo durlaBaH
'samindra rAyA samizA raBemahi' (aTarva॰20.21.5) saMraBemahi saMyujyemahi rayimanta iqvantaSca syAmetyAha
'kzatreRAgne svena saMraBasva' (aTarva॰2.6.4) ukto'rTaH
'agne sarvAstanvaH saMraBasva' (aTarva॰19.3.2) saMraBasva=saNkalaya tatra tatra viBaktAstanUrekatra sammelayetyAha
'yadA vE dvO saMraBete aTa tO vIryaM kurutaH' (Sa॰brA॰14.1.1.3) saMraBete=itaretaramAlambete
'tadyoktre BftyAH saMraBante' (aTarva॰14.2.53) saMraBante=karzanti tadgfhItaye vA saMyatante tadyoktre=tasyA vaDvA yoktre
'ityupAdeyavarge'smin yadarTaM pratiBA kaveH samyak saMraBate tasya guRaH sOBAgyamucyate' (vakrokti॰1.55).. saMraBate samyak sAvaDAnatayA vyavasyati
'miTileSvara kimiti saMraBase' (bA॰rA॰1) atyantamutsahase
'yudDEkaruce mA nirBaraM saMraBasva' (bA॰rA॰2.16) mAtimAtramutsahizWAH
'ramaRIyAn bahuviDAn pAdapAn kusumotkawAn sItAvacanasaMrabDa AnayAmAsa lakzmaRaH' (rA॰2.53.30).. saMrabDaH=tvaryyammARaH
'na mAmanyesa saMrabDaM pramattaM vedDumarhasi' (rA॰4.17.21) anyena sarabDamanyena saMyuktama yuDyamAnamityarTaH
'saMrabDataramatyarTaM vAkyaM vAkyaviSAradaH' (rA॰1.53.17) saMrabDataramatyAgrahayuktam
'naKANkuSAGAtaviBinnakumBAH saMrabDasiMhaprahftaM vahanti' (raGu॰16.16) saMrabDaH=kupitaH
'kavacotseDasaMrabDakaRWAyAsa॰' (rAja॰5.344) saMrabDaH=sameDitaH
'saMrabDamAnaH' (=vfdDadarpaH) (BA॰u॰2.12) saMramBamAraRa iti pAWAntaram haWaM kurvARa iti tadarTaH
'saMrabDanetra॰' (rA॰gore॰saM॰2.76.32) ucCUnanayana॰ ityarTaH
'saMrabDavraRa' (suSrate 2.6.11) ukto'rTaH
'praRipAtapratIkAraH saMramBo hi mahAtmanAm' (raGu॰4.64) saMramBaH kopaH
'saMramBo hi sapatnItvAd vaktuM kuntisutAM prati' (BA॰Adi॰124.6) saMramBaH=aBimAnaH darpaH
'saMramBaBayayogena vindate tatsvarUpatAm' (BA॰pu॰7.1.28) saMramBo dvezaH anyatra durlaBo'yamarTaH purARakArasya svasyopajYA
'tvayA'pi tasmin saMramBo na kAryaH' (daSaku॰) tadarTaviGAtakA upAyA nAsTeyA ityAha
'na saMramBeRa siDyanti sarve'rTAH sAntvayA yaTA' (BA॰pu॰8.6.24) tvarayA hiMsayA vetyAha sAntvamiti viditaM sAntvaneti ca sAntveti strIliNgaM tu parokzapriyasyAsya kavereva
'avfzwisaMramBamivAmbuvAham' (ku॰3.48) saMramBaH=kzoBaH
'anyonyajayasaMramBo vavfDe vAdinoriva' (raGu॰12.92) saMramBaH=Otsukyam samutsAhaH
'hanta varDate te saMramBaH' (SA॰7)
'yataSca jAtasaMramBo na ca SatruvaSaM gataH' (BA॰vi॰34.13) saMramBo Bayam
'tatra SuSrAva vE SabdaM toyasaMramBavarjitam' (rA॰1.24.5) toyasaMramBeRa=taraNgasaNGawwajanmanA kzoBeRa
'saMraBamARo vijitaH prasahya' (BA॰u॰2.12) saraBamARaH=kruDyan haWaM kurvARa iti nIla॰
'pravftaM raja ityeva tanna saMraBya cintayet' (BA॰SAM॰194.32) saMraBya=BItvA
'saMrabDAH saMsarpanti' (CAM0 u0 1124) saMrabDAH saMlagnAH
'aSmanvatI rIyate saMraBaDvam' (f0 10538) saMraBaDvaM tvaraDvam
'mayi saMraBya vipulamadAcCApaM suduHsaham' (BA0 pu0 42722) mayi saMraBya mahyaM krudDvA
'ta vidyAkarmaRI samanvAraBete pUrvaprajYA ca' (Sa0 brA0 14723) samamanubaDnItaH yugapacClizyataH
'tasminnupavizwAyAM samanvArabDAyAm' (ASva0 gf0 169)
'saptahotAraM manasA'nudrutyAhavanIye sagrahaM hutvodaYcaH prahvA bahizpavamAnArTaM paYcartvijaH samanvArabDAH sarpanti' (Apa0 SrO0 121617) samanvArabDA itaretaramavalambamAnAH
'vigrahaH samupArabDo nahi SAmyatyavigrahAt' (BA.u0 886)
'anvAraBeTAmanusaMraBeTAm' (aTarva0 61223) saMraBeTAm=satataM saMrabDO BavatamityAha
'yadvAyavyaM vA camasaM vA'nvAraByASrAvayet' (tE0 saM0 3128) anvAraBya haste gfhItvA
'somaM rAjAnaM varuRamagnimanvAraBAmahe' (tE0 saM0 1710) praTamataH karmAramBakAnanusftya paScAdAraBAmahe ityarTa iti sAyaRaH
'eza yajYasyAnvAramBo'navacCittyE' (tE0 611175) anvAramBaH sparSaH
'teno sa uBO vyanvAraBamARa etImaM cAmuM ca lokam' (E0 brA0 68) sarvataH saMspfSannityarTaH
'yadfcEva hOtraM kriyate yajuzA''DvaryavaM sAmnodgITaM vyArabDA trayI vidyA Bavati (E0 brA0 533) vyArabDA samyag dfQaM vA sarvato vA DftA Bavati
'AraBante'lpamevAjYAH' AraBante prakramante
'mA''rabDA balivigraham' (Bawwi0 538) balinA rAmeRa vigrahaM yudDaM mA''rabDA mopakraMsTA mA kArzIrityarTaH tfRErAraByate rajjuH AraByate nirmIyate
'vAcA hyAraBante yadyadAraBante' (Sa0 brA0 12241)
'A tvA ramBaM na jibrayo raraBmA Savasaspate' (f0 84520) AraraBma AreBimahe AraBAmahe'valambAmahe ramBo daRqaH
'A te hastO raBAmahe' (aTarva0 818) AraBAmahe AlambAmahe gfhRImahe
'ye tvAraBya carAmasi' (1574) tvA''raBya=tvAmAlambya
'BUtEH paYcaBirArabDe dehe' (BA0 pu0 33130) ArabDe nirmite
'varzIyAMSca pfTivyA DruvaH sarvamAraBya tizWati' (Apa0 Da0 1239) AraBya vizwaBya SezitvenADizWAyetyujjvalAyAM haradattaH saMstaByeti tu SaNkarAcAryaH
'mfgAtiSaya tad brUhi kamAraByeti BAzase' (avadA0 rurujA0 27) kamAraBya kamuddiSya kamaDikftya
'mAlatyAH praTamAvalokadivasAdAraBya' (mAlatI0 6) AraBya AdAya divasAt praBfti
'ayaTAbalamAramBo nidAnaM kzayasampadaH' (SiSu0 294) AramBo'BiyAnam yAnam
'AramBe pAramezWyaM tu na prApyamiti me matiH' (BA0 saBA0 155) rAjasUyAramBe
'AgamEH sadfSAramBaH' (raGu0 115) AramBaScaryA
'kiM svidAsIdaDizWAnamAramBaRaM katamat svitkaTAsIt' (f0 10812) AramBaRamAlambanasTAnam
'tAM pratyArabDiraBavatkruDyatAM sarvamantriRAm' (rAja0 66348) ArabDiraBiyAnam
'yajYo vE deveByo'pAkrAmat sa suparRarUpaM kftvA'carat taM devA etEH sAmaBirAraBanta' (paYca0 brA0 4310) AraBanta agfhRan
'AraBAmahe tvA jIrRA iva daRqam' (ni0 3211) avalambAmaha ityarTaH
'antarikze'nAramBaRAnyAdAyAtmAnaM paripatanti' (CAM0 u0 294) anAramBaRAni anAlambanAti anASrayARi
'daSa svasAro agruvaH samIcIH pumAMsaM jAtamaBi saM raBante' (f0 32913) aBisaMraBante aBigfhRate
'tfzRA kroDo'BisaMramBaH' (BA0 ASva0 312) aBisaMramBo dvezABiniveSaH
'tadAhuH kasminnftAvaByAramBa iti grIzmeByAraBeta' (Sa0 brA0 13412) aByAraBeta upakrameta prakrameta
'avareREva tadahnA paramaharaByAraBante' (E0 brA0 65) aBimuKIkftyAraBanta upakramante
'sarveRApararAtreRa viramya pratyAramBo na vidyate' (kO0 sU0 14141) pratyAramBaH punarAramBaH
'naha pratyAramBe' (pA0 8131) coditasyAvaDIraRe upAlipsayA pratizeDayuktaH pratyAramBaH kriyate--naha Bokzyase iti vfttiH nizeDayukta AramBaH pratyAramBa iti sidDAntakOmudyAM dIkzitaH
'yo yaH sma samare pArTaM pratisaMraBate' (BA0 droRa0 8920) pratisaMraBate vegena pratigacCati Askandati pratigfhRAti pratisaMcarata iti pAWAntaram

'naha pratyAramBe (pA0 8139) coditasyAvaDIraRe upAlipsayA pratizeDayuktaH pratyAramBaH kriyata iti kASikA pratizeDayukta AramBaH pratyAramBa iti tu dIkzitaH saMkzeparucirdIkzito mitAkzaratAmicCati na viSadatAm
'bAhuByAM pariraByEnaM prAboDayadaninditA' (BA0 vi0 1713) pariraBya upaguhya pariSlizya
'ityuktavantaM pariraBya dorByAm' (ki0 1180)
'pariraBya vakzasA' (ku0 53) ukto'rTaH
'nAgaBogena mahatA pariraBya mahImimAm' (BA0 vana0)
'grAmo grAmasya sAmantaH… gfhaM gfhasTaM nirdizwaM samantAt pariraBya hi' (yAjYa0 2150-51 mitAkzarAyAM kAtyAyanavacanam) pariraBya parivezwya
